# **\--Fundamental School--**

* # Isekai History

  * Every Kingdom/city has fundamental schools where reading & basic math is taught  
  * Usually, children in Profession tiers III-VI enroll in school at around age 6\.  
  * Kids of Profession Tier I \~ II become apprentices of the same job types until around 18 years old, when they are promoted to masters. They attend classes more often than not.  
    * One can take a replacement test instead at any school to prove they have fundamental knowledge 

* # Cost

  * \~1 Aquamarine to your local school.  
    * \*Exceptions apply. See the respective kingdom

* # Length

  * 5 years.

* # Clothing

  * See respective kingdoms. In cities coordinated by Forway, children wear standardized clothing as below.

  ![][image1]

# **\--Specialized School--**

* # Isekai History

  * Upon graduating from Fundamental school, children might attend a specialized school. All schools listed below are located in Forway City.

  * ## Cooking School (\#E1)

    * Students become closely acquainted with cooking, including detecting poisonous foods.

  * ## Tailoring School (\#E2)

    * Students become closely acquainted with the craft of clothing and its repair.

  * ## Construction School (\#E3)

    * Students become closely acquainted with Construction and are trained to be construction Managers.

  * ## Accounting School (\#E4)

    * Students become closely acquainted with trading, bookkeeping, and all related matters.

  * ## Historian/Teaching School (\#E5)

    * Students become closely acquainted with the history of the kingdom and teaching. Often, archaeologists pair up with Adventurers.

  * ## Blacksmithing School (\#E6)

    * Students become closely acquainted with the blacksmithing of their desired traits, such as Darkwood, Bone, Iron, etc.

  * ## Combat School (\#E7)

    * Students become closely acquainted with close-quarters combat using swords/clubs, shields, bows, etc. This is more tailored to guards, but some make the jump to adventurers instead.

  * ## Adventurer School (\#E8)

    * Students become closely acquainted with Forway’s usage of adventurers and how to best maintain the peace with Forway’s control of the region. Examples of the methodology include a deep understanding of how each kingdom behaves and undisclosed threats to the public.  
    * Usually taught in tandem with combat school or soul energy school.

  * ## Soul Energy School (\#E9)

    * Students become closely acquainted with Soul Energy and are taught all available Soul Energy interfaces while expanding their soul to avoid using Nari stones.  
    * Usually focused on research, specifically people who love Soul Energy, but are afraid of becoming adventurers. Some do want to learn more about it as they can research on the go, or find new niches to make money from by supporting parties.

* # Cost

  * Costs 5 Sapphire for the entire schooling program.   
    * Includes room, breakfast at Sunnilow & dinner at Sunnohigh (simple meals)

* # Length

  * Specialized School takes about 4 years  
    * Except for Adventurer School. That only takes half-year.  
  * Upon graduating and starting to work, students often stay as an apprentice for about 10 years before making masters  
    * They start working as apprentices around age 16\.  
    * Become masters at around \~26 Years old.

* # Clothing

  * Varies per specialized school. Some require standards (cooking, adventuring, blacksmithing, etc.), while others are more laid-back (Soul Energy, accounting, tailoring, etc.).
